field.contacts.description: Field title for the customer-service contacts in site settings

field.markupRatio.description: Site settings: uniform markup percentage applied to all recharge packages on this site

message.markupRatioTip.message: Set a uniform markup for all services on this site (0%–500%). A custom per-service markup below overrides this value.
message.markupRatioTip.description: Help text for the markup ratio setting

message.markupExample.message: For example, if the official price is $20 and you enter 10, your price is $22.
message.markupExample.description: Fixed example under the markup setting

field.disableRecharge.description: Site settings: when on, hide all recharge/top-up entries on this site

message.disableRechargeTip.message: When enabled, all recharge/top-up buttons are hidden on this site and users can no longer top up their balance.
message.disableRechargeTip.description: Help text for the disable-recharge toggle

field.distributionDefaultInviterId.description: Displayed as the title in the editing box

field.distributionForceInviterId.description: Displayed as the title in the editing box

field.authEnabledProviders.description: Settings / Login Methods tab title — checkboxes for which authentication providers the site offers on its login page.

field.authDefaultProvider.description: Settings / Login Methods tab title — which login provider is pre-selected when the login page first opens.

field.authProvider_email.description: Login provider display name: email (email + password or verification code).

field.authProvider_phone.description: Login provider display name: phone number (SMS verification code).

field.authProvider_google.description: Login provider display name: Google OAuth.

field.authProvider_github.description: Login provider display name: GitHub OAuth.

field.authProvider_apple.description: Login provider display name: Sign in with Apple.

field.authProvider_wechat.description: Login provider display name: WeChat OAuth.

field.authSmsWebhook.description: Site settings / login: title for the site's own custom SMS verification-code delivery webhook

message.authSmsWebhookTip.message: When enabled, this site's phone verification codes are sent through your own endpoint under your own signature; disable it to use the platform default. Requires the phone-number login provider to be enabled.
message.authSmsWebhookTip.description: Explains the custom SMS sender webhook

placeholder.authSmsWebhookUrl.description: Placeholder for the SMS webhook URL input

placeholder.authSmsWebhookSecret.message: Signing secret (leave blank to keep unchanged)
placeholder.authSmsWebhookSecret.description: Placeholder for the SMS webhook signing secret input; write-only, blank keeps existing

field.authSmsWebhookEnable.description: Label next to the custom SMS sender toggle

field.authSmsWebhookDoc.description: Link that opens the SMS webhook spec dialog

field.authSmsWebhookTest.description: Button that opens the SMS webhook test dialog

message.authSmsWebhookNeedsPhone.message: Enable the phone-number login provider first to configure a custom SMS sender.
message.authSmsWebhookNeedsPhone.description: Tooltip shown when the toggle is disabled because phone login is off

field.authSmsWebhookDocTitle.description: Title of the SMS webhook spec dialog

message.authSmsWebhookDocIntro.message: This site sends a signed HTTPS POST to the URL you provide; your service is responsible for delivering the SMS. Your endpoint must meet the following requirements:
message.authSmsWebhookDocIntro.description: Intro paragraph of the SMS webhook spec dialog

field.authSmsWebhookDocRequest.description: Heading: request section of the SMS webhook spec

message.authSmsWebhookDocRequest.message: Method POST, Content-Type application/json. purpose is one of login / register / test (test is a connectivity probe — you may skip actually sending). The request body looks like:
message.authSmsWebhookDocRequest.description: Describes the request method and body of the SMS webhook

field.authSmsWebhookDocHeaders.description: Heading: signature section of the SMS webhook spec

message.authSmsWebhookDocHeaders.message: Each request carries the headers below. Verify with your signing secret using HMAC-SHA256 per the Standard Webhooks spec and compare in constant time:
message.authSmsWebhookDocHeaders.description: Describes signature verification for the SMS webhook

field.authSmsWebhookDocResponse.description: Heading: response section of the SMS webhook spec

message.authSmsWebhookDocResponse.message: Return 2xx on success. To signal failure explicitly, return HTTP 200 with a JSON body whose success field is false (see the example below). Respond within 5 seconds.
message.authSmsWebhookDocResponse.description: Describes the expected response of the SMS webhook

field.authSmsWebhookTestTitle.description: Title of the SMS webhook test dialog

field.authSmsWebhookTestRegion.description: Label for the region-code field in the test dialog

field.authSmsWebhookTestNumber.description: Label for the phone-number field in the test dialog

field.authSmsWebhookTestSend.description: Button that sends the SMS webhook test request

message.authSmsWebhookTestOk.message: The test request was delivered to your endpoint successfully.
message.authSmsWebhookTestOk.description: Success message after a webhook test

message.authSmsWebhookTestFailed.message: Test failed. Check the URL, signing secret, and your endpoint's response.
message.authSmsWebhookTestFailed.description: Failure message after a webhook test

field.authSmsWebhookDisableTitle.description: Title of the confirm dialog shown when disabling the custom SMS sender

message.authSmsWebhookDisableConfirm.message: Disabling this deletes the saved sender URL and signing secret (the secret cannot be recovered), and this site falls back to the platform default signature. Disable it?
message.authSmsWebhookDisableConfirm.description: Body of the confirm dialog shown when disabling the custom SMS sender

message.uploadImageExceed.description: Prompt for exceeding image upload limit

imageCropper.dropHere.message: Drag image here or click to upload
imageCropper.dropHere.description: Empty state prompt for image cropper

imageCropper.formatHint.message: Supports JPG / PNG / WebP, max 20 MB
imageCropper.formatHint.description: Allowed file formats for image cropper

imageCropper.zoomIn.description: Zoom in button for image cropper

imageCropper.zoomOut.description: Zoom out button for image cropper

imageCropper.rotateLeft.description: Counterclockwise rotate button for image cropper

imageCropper.rotateRight.description: Clockwise rotate button for image cropper

imageCropper.flipHorizontal.description: Horizontal flip button for image cropper

imageCropper.replace.description: Replace image button for image cropper

imageCropper.invalidType.description: Error for unsupported format in image cropper

imageCropper.noImage.description: Error for no image selected in image cropper

imageCropper.uploadFailed.description: Error for failed upload in image cropper

message.atLeastOneAdmin.message: At Least One Admin Must Remain
message.atLeastOneAdmin.description: Prompt for retaining at least one admin

message.distributionDefaultInviterIdTip.message: User ID of the default inviter. If the distribution link does not carry the inviter_id parameter, this user ID will be used as the inviter by default.

message.distributionForceInviterIdTip.message: User ID of the forced inviter. If this ID is set, it will be used as the inviter regardless of whether the distribution link carries the inviter_id parameter.

message.authEnabledProvidersTip.message: Pick which authentication methods this site's login page offers. At least one method must remain enabled, otherwise no one will be able to sign in.
message.authEnabledProvidersTip.description: Helper text under the Enabled Login Methods row in the Login Methods tab.

message.authDefaultProviderTip.message: The login method that is pre-selected when a user opens the login page. Must be one of the enabled methods above.
message.authDefaultProviderTip.description: Helper text under the Default Login Method row in the Login Methods tab.

message.authProvidersAtLeastOne.message: At least one login method must remain enabled.
message.authProvidersAtLeastOne.description: Warning toast when the user tries to disable every login method at once.

message.originTip.message: Site domain, site configuration is bound to the domain, and the site domain cannot be changed.

message.titleTip.message: Site title, displayed in the browser tab.

message.descriptionTip.message: Site description, located in the site metadata, used for site SEO optimization.

message.logoTip.message: Site Logo, displayed at the top of the site menu when the menu bar is expanded.

message.faviconTip.message: Site Favicon, displayed in the browser tab.

message.primaryColorTip.message: Primary brand colour for the site. Applies to buttons, links, highlights, and accent gradients across the entire UI.
message.primaryColorTip.description: Tip for the per-site primary colour picker

message.adminsTip.message: Site admin IDs, by default, the user who first creates the site will become an admin. Only site admins can manage the site.

message.adminsTip2.message: You can add or remove admin IDs here. You can view user IDs at https://auth.acedata.cloud

message.contactsTip.message: Fill in your customer-service contacts (Discord, X, WeChat, phone, email). They are shown on the About page so users can reach you.

message.contactsEmpty.description: Placeholder shown when no support contact has been filled in

message.keywordsTip.message: Site keywords, located in the site metadata, used for site SEO optimization.

message.keywordsTip2.message: You can add or remove site keywords here. The more precise the keywords, the more beneficial for SEO optimization.

message.featuresChat.message: Enable or disable the Chat feature module.

message.featuresGrok.message: xAI assistant for real-time knowledge, reasoning, writing, and coding.
message.featuresGrok.description: Concise capability introduction: xAI assistant for real-time knowledge, reasoning, writing, and coding.

message.featuresGrokvideo.message: xAI video generation for short clips from text prompts or reference images.
message.featuresGrokvideo.description: Concise capability introduction: xAI video generation for short clips from text prompts or reference images.

message.featuresMaestro.message: Produce complete videos from an idea, including planning, voiceover, scenes, and delivery.
message.featuresMaestro.description: Concise capability introduction: Produce complete videos from an idea, including planning, voiceover, scenes, and delivery.

message.featuresDigitalhuman.message: Create talking-head videos with synthesized speech and natural lip sync.
message.featuresDigitalhuman.description: Concise capability introduction: Create talking-head videos with synthesized speech and natural lip sync.

message.featuresDeepseek.message: DeepSeek assistant for advanced reasoning, coding, math, and everyday questions.
message.featuresDeepseek.description: Concise capability introduction: DeepSeek assistant for advanced reasoning, coding, math, and everyday questions.

message.featuresChatgpt.message: OpenAI assistant for writing, reasoning, coding, and multimodal conversations.
message.featuresChatgpt.description: Concise capability introduction: OpenAI assistant for writing, reasoning, coding, and multimodal conversations.

message.featuresMidjourney.message: Create polished images and creative variations from text or visual references.
message.featuresMidjourney.description: Concise capability introduction: Create polished images and creative variations from text or visual references.

message.featuresChatdoc.message: Enable or disable the Chatdoc feature module.

message.featuresQrart.message: Turn links into scannable artistic QR codes with custom styles and imagery.
message.featuresQrart.description: Concise capability introduction: Turn links into scannable artistic QR codes with custom styles and imagery.

message.featuresVeo.message: Google video generation for cinematic clips with strong prompt and motion control.
message.featuresVeo.description: Concise capability introduction: Google video generation for cinematic clips with strong prompt and motion control.

message.featuresSora.message: OpenAI video generation for realistic scenes, storytelling, and visual transformations.
message.featuresSora.description: Concise capability introduction: OpenAI video generation for realistic scenes, storytelling, and visual transformations.

message.featuresSuno.message: Generate complete songs, lyrics, vocals, and instrumentals from a prompt.
message.featuresSuno.description: Concise capability introduction: Generate complete songs, lyrics, vocals, and instrumentals from a prompt.

message.featuresPixverse.message: Generate stylized videos from prompts and images with templates and effects.
message.featuresPixverse.description: Concise capability introduction: Generate stylized videos from prompts and images with templates and effects.

message.featuresFlux.message: Create detailed images and edit existing visuals with natural-language instructions.
message.featuresFlux.description: Concise capability introduction: Create detailed images and edit existing visuals with natural-language instructions.

message.featuresNanobanana.message: Google-powered image generation and editing with precise instruction following.
message.featuresNanobanana.description: Concise capability introduction: Google-powered image generation and editing with precise instruction following.

message.featuresOpenaiimage.message: OpenAI image generation and editing for polished visuals, text, and compositions.
message.featuresOpenaiimage.description: Concise capability introduction: OpenAI image generation and editing for polished visuals, text, and compositions.

message.featuresSeedream.message: ByteDance image generation and editing for high-quality creative visuals.
message.featuresSeedream.description: Concise capability introduction: ByteDance image generation and editing for high-quality creative visuals.

message.featuresSeedance.message: ByteDance video generation for dynamic scenes, camera motion, and optional audio.
message.featuresSeedance.description: Concise capability introduction: ByteDance video generation for dynamic scenes, camera motion, and optional audio.

message.featuresOmni.message: Generate or edit videos from text, images, and video references with Omni models.
message.featuresOmni.description: Concise capability introduction: Generate or edit videos from text, images, and video references with Omni models.

message.featuresWan.message: Alibaba video generation from text, images, or references at multiple resolutions.
message.featuresWan.description: Concise capability introduction: Alibaba video generation from text, images, or references at multiple resolutions.

message.featuresProducer.message: Create songs, covers, extensions, and vocal or instrumental variations.
message.featuresProducer.description: Concise capability introduction: Create songs, covers, extensions, and vocal or instrumental variations.

message.featuresKimi.message: Moonshot AI assistant for long-context research, reasoning, writing, and coding.
message.featuresKimi.description: Concise capability introduction: Moonshot AI assistant for long-context research, reasoning, writing, and coding.

message.featuresSerp.message: Search the web, images, news, maps, and videos with structured Google results.
message.featuresSerp.description: Concise capability introduction: Search the web, images, news, maps, and videos with structured Google results.

message.featuresFish.message: Generate natural speech and clone voices for multilingual audio production.
message.featuresFish.description: Concise capability introduction: Generate natural speech and clone voices for multilingual audio production.

message.featuresCodingBridge.message: Connect AI coding assistants to local projects for guided development workflows.
message.featuresCodingBridge.description: Concise capability introduction: Connect AI coding assistants to local projects for guided development workflows.

message.featuresWebextrator.message: Extract clean, structured content and data from web pages.
message.featuresWebextrator.description: Concise capability introduction: Extract clean, structured content and data from web pages.

message.featuresLuma.message: Create cinematic videos from text or images with natural motion.
message.featuresLuma.description: Concise capability introduction: Create cinematic videos from text or images with natural motion.

message.featuresPika.message: Generate and edit short creative videos with effects, scenes, and transformations.
message.featuresPika.description: Concise capability introduction: Generate and edit short creative videos with effects, scenes, and transformations.

message.featuresKling.message: Create high-quality videos from text, images, or motion references.
message.featuresKling.description: Concise capability introduction: Create high-quality videos from text, images, or motion references.

message.featuresHailuo.message: Generate expressive videos from text or images with smooth character motion.
message.featuresHailuo.description: Concise capability introduction: Generate expressive videos from text or images with smooth character motion.

message.featuresI18n.message: Enable or disable multilingual support. When disabled, users can only use the default language.

button.resetPrimaryColor.description: Reset the per-site primary colour back to the platform default

button.enabled.description: Toggle text indicating it is enabled

button.disabled.description: Toggle text indicating it is disabled

field.featuresGemini.description: Displayed as the title in the editing box

message.featuresGemini.message: Google assistant for long-context reasoning, research, coding, and multimodal work.
message.featuresGemini.description: Concise capability introduction: Google assistant for long-context reasoning, research, coding, and multimodal work.

field.featuresClaude.description: Displayed as the title in the editing box

message.featuresClaude.message: Anthropic assistant for careful reasoning, writing, coding, and document analysis.
message.featuresClaude.description: Concise capability introduction: Anthropic assistant for careful reasoning, writing, coding, and document analysis.

placeholder.admins.description: Placeholder in the admin editing box in site settings

message.userNotFound.description: Shown when the user lookup endpoint returns 404 in the picker preview.

message.editUserHint.message: Type a full UUID, username, email or phone to look up a user.
message.editUserHint.description: Tip below the lookup input in the inviter / admin user picker dialog.

message.editUsersEmpty.description: Empty-state text shown when the admins list has no users.

message.userAlreadyAdded.description: Disabled-state label on the Add button when the resolved user is already in the admin list.

title.addUser.description: Divider title in the admins picker, between the existing-admins list and the lookup input.

button.addUser.description: Button label to add the resolved user to the admins list.

autoTranslate.tooltipOn.message: Auto-translation ON — content shows in visitor's language
autoTranslate.tooltipOn.description: Tooltip on the auto-translate toggle when it is ON

autoTranslate.tooltipOff.message: Literal storage — click to enable auto-translation
autoTranslate.tooltipOff.description: Tooltip on the auto-translate toggle when it is OFF

autoTranslate.tooltipDisabledNotSaved.message: Save the row before enabling auto-translation
autoTranslate.tooltipDisabledNotSaved.description: Tooltip shown when the toggle is disabled because the row has no id yet (create-dialog state)

autoTranslate.confirmEnable.message: This content will be translated into 17 languages within ~1 hour. Continue?
autoTranslate.confirmEnable.description: Body text of the confirm dialog shown before enabling auto-translation

autoTranslate.confirmDisable.message: Disabling removes all 18 languages of translation, keeping only the current value. Continue?
autoTranslate.confirmDisable.description: Body text of the confirm dialog shown before disabling auto-translation

autoTranslate.empty.message: Enter some content before enabling auto-translation
autoTranslate.empty.description: Warning shown when the user tries to enable auto-translation on an empty field

autoTranslate.error.message: Failed to toggle auto-translation, please retry
autoTranslate.error.description: Fallback error toast when the enable/disable HTTP call fails with no detail

services.tip.message: Hide, rename, re-price or reorder individual services. A blank markup inherits the site-wide default. Deleting a row reverts the service to its catalog defaults.

services.empty.message: No overrides yet — every service uses its catalog defaults.

services.field.displaySummary.description: Per-service override: custom summary shown on this site's homepage card

services.placeholder.service.message: Pick a service from the catalog

services.placeholder.displayTitle.message: Leave blank to use the catalog title

services.placeholder.displaySummary.message: Leave blank to use the catalog description

services.tip.visible.message: When off, the service is hidden on this site's homepage (users who already have it keep access).

services.tip.markup.message: Enter a percentage markup: 10 means +10%, up to 500. Leave blank to inherit the site default.

services.message.deleteConfirm.message: Delete the override for “{name}”? The service reverts to its catalog defaults.

capabilityOverride.edit.description: Tooltip and accessible label for editing a capability app name and icon

capabilityOverride.dialogTitle.description: Dialog title; {name} is the platform-default capability app name

capabilityOverride.displayName.description: Field label for a per-site capability app display name

capabilityOverride.displayNameTip.message: Leave blank to use {name}. Save once before enabling automatic translation.
capabilityOverride.displayNameTip.description: Help text; {name} is the platform-default capability app name

capabilityOverride.icon.description: Field label for a per-site capability app icon

capabilityOverride.defaultIcon.description: Label above the platform-default capability icon preview

capabilityOverride.currentIcon.description: Label above the effective capability icon preview

capabilityOverride.replaceIcon.description: Command to upload a replacement capability icon

capabilityOverride.uploadIcon.description: Command to upload the first custom capability icon

capabilityOverride.useDefaultIcon.description: Command to clear the custom icon draft

capabilityOverride.iconTip.message: PNG, JPEG, or WebP. The image is cropped to a square; transparent PNG is preserved.

capabilityOverride.editIcon.description: Title of the capability icon cropper dialog

capabilityOverride.resetAll.description: Command that removes both custom name and icon

capabilityOverride.empty.message: Enter a custom name or upload an icon first.
capabilityOverride.empty.description: Warning when attempting to create an empty override

capabilityOverride.saved.description: Success message after saving a capability override

capabilityOverride.savedEnableTranslatio.message: Saved. You can now enable automatic translation for the custom name.
capabilityOverride.savedEnableTranslatio.description: Success message after first save creates an override ID

capabilityOverride.saveFailed.description: Fallback error for capability override writes

capabilityOverride.resetConfirm.message: Restore the default name and icon for {name}?
capabilityOverride.resetConfirm.description: Confirmation message; {name} is the platform-default capability app name

capabilityOverride.resetDone.description: Success message after deleting a capability override

capabilityOverride.fetchFailed.description: Error shown when capability override management rows cannot be loaded
